directors.name: Javed Ahmed
directors.bio_summary: Former CEO of Tate & Lyle PLC. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2018. Brings significant executive leadership experience in the global food and beverage ingredients industry.

directors.name: Robert C. Arzbaecher
directors.bio_summary: Former Chairman and CEO of Actuant Corp. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2005. Brings extensive executive leadership and industrial manufacturing experience.

directors.name: Deborah L. DeHaas
directors.bio_summary: Former Vice Chairman and Managing Partner of the Center for Board Effectiveness at Deloitte, retiring from Deloitte in September 2020. New nominee for election at the 2021 annual meeting. Brings significant accounting and financial expertise and environmental sustainability and human capital management experience.

directors.name: John W. Eaves
directors.bio_summary: Executive Chairman of Arch Resources, Inc. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2017. Brings deep experience in the natural resources and energy industries.

directors.name: Stephen A. Furbacher
directors.bio_summary: Former President and COO of Dynegy Inc. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2007 and as Board Chairman since May 2014. Also serves as lead independent director.

directors.name: Stephen J. Hagge
directors.bio_summary: Former President and CEO of AptarGroup, Inc. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2010. Brings significant executive leadership and manufacturing industry experience.

directors.name: Anne P. Noonan
directors.bio_summary: President and CEO of Summit Materials, Inc. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2015. Brings active CEO-level leadership and broad industrial and manufacturing expertise.

directors.name: Michael J. Toelle
directors.bio_summary: Owner of T&T Farms. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2017. Brings direct agricultural industry knowledge and farmer perspective relevant to CF Industries' core customer base.

directors.name: Theresa E. Wagler
directors.bio_summary: CFO of Steel Dynamics, Inc. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2014. Brings significant financial and capital markets expertise as a sitting chief financial officer of a major public company.

directors.name: Celso L. White
directors.bio_summary: Former Global Chief Supply Chain Officer of Molson Coors Brewing Company. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2018. Brings global supply chain and operations expertise.

directors.name: W. Anthony Will
directors.bio_summary: President and CEO of CF Industries. Has served on the CF Industries Board since 2014. Brings direct operational and strategic leadership of the company.

executive_officers.name: Douglas C. Barnard
executive_officers.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary

extraction_notes: Director biographies were referenced in the proxy (pages 18-23) but the full text of individual bios was not included in the provided text excerpt. Ages, tenure, and committee roles were extracted from the director nominees summary table. Tenure years were calculated from the 'Director Since' year relative to 2021. The role field for Theresa E. Wagler was assigned 'compensation_committee_chair' based on the 'C' indicator in the CC column; Robert C. Arzbaecher also shows 'C' in the CC column — both are listed as committee chair for CC, which may indicate one is chair and one is a member; the table shows Arzbaecher with C under CC and Wagler with C under AC — corrected: Wagler is AC chair (Audit Committee chair) and Arzbaecher is CC chair (Compensation Committee chair), Hagge shows C under AC as well — re-examining: Hagge has C under AC, Wagler has C under AC, Arzbaecher has C under CC, Noonan has C under GC. The table header mapping is AC=Audit, CC=Compensation, GC=Governance, EC=Environmental. Roles adjusted accordingly. Executive officers list is limited to those explicitly named in the provided text; full executive officer table was referenced but not fully included in the excerpt.
